articles.title: Understanding Type 2 Diabetes
articles.description: Comprehensive guide to understanding type 2 diabetes, its causes, and management strategies.

articles.title: Diabetes Management and Care
articles.description: Evidence-based information about managing diabetes effectively.

lifestyleTips: Monitor your blood sugar levels regularly as recommended by your healthcare provider.
Follow a balanced diet with controlled portions of carbohydrates throughout the day.
Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate aerobic activity per week.
Maintain a healthy weight through diet and exercise.
Take medications as prescribed and attend regular check-ups.
Stay hydrated and limit sugary beverages.
Check your feet daily for any cuts, blisters, or signs of infection.

articles.title: High Blood Pressure Facts
articles.description: Essential facts about hypertension and its management.

articles.title: Managing High Blood Pressure
articles.description: Guide to understanding and managing high blood pressure.

lifestyleTips: Monitor your blood pressure regularly at home and keep a log.
Reduce sodium intake to less than 2,300 mg per day.
Exercise regularly - aim for 30 minutes of moderate activity most days.
Maintain a healthy weight through diet and exercise.
Limit alcohol consumption and avoid smoking.
Manage stress through relaxation techniques like meditation or yoga.
Take blood pressure medications as prescribed.

articles.title: Asthma Overview
articles.description: Comprehensive information about asthma causes, symptoms, and treatment.

articles.title: Living with Asthma
articles.description: Resources for managing asthma and improving quality of life.

lifestyleTips: Identify and avoid your asthma triggers (dust, pollen, smoke, etc.).
Always carry your rescue inhaler with you.
Use your controller medication daily as prescribed, even when feeling well.
Monitor your peak flow readings regularly.
Get annual flu vaccines and stay up to date with pneumonia vaccines.
Exercise regularly but warm up properly and follow your asthma action plan.
Keep your home clean and free from dust mites and allergens.

articles.title: Understanding Cholesterol
articles.description: Learn about cholesterol types and how to manage high cholesterol.

articles.title: Cholesterol Management
articles.description: Strategies for maintaining healthy cholesterol levels.

lifestyleTips: Follow a heart-healthy diet low in saturated and trans fats.
Include more fiber-rich foods like oats, beans, and vegetables.
Exercise regularly - aim for at least 150 minutes per week.
Maintain a healthy weight.
Quit smoking if you smoke.
Limit alcohol consumption.
Take cholesterol-lowering medications as prescribed.

articles.title: Osteoporosis: What You Need to Know
articles.source: NIH Osteoporosis and Related Bone Diseases
articles.description: Comprehensive information about osteoporosis prevention and treatment.

lifestyleTips: Get adequate calcium (1,000-1,200 mg daily) through diet or supplements.
Ensure sufficient vitamin D intake (800-1,000 IU daily).
Engage in weight-bearing and muscle-strengthening exercises regularly.
Avoid smoking and limit alcohol consumption.
Take fall-prevention measures at home (remove rugs, improve lighting).
Have your bone density checked as recommended by your doctor.
Take osteoporosis medications as prescribed.
